title: Ocugen Analyst Ratings and Earnings Estimates on Yahoo Finance
text: Yahoo Finance analyst coverage of Ocugen Inc. showing strong buy consensus. Number of analysts covering stock: 6. Current consensus rating: Strong Buy. Price target consensus: $9.75 with range from $7.00 to $12.33. Upside potential: 438.67% from trading levels. Earnings estimates: Next quarter EPS forecast -$0.05 per share. Full year 2026 EPS estimate negative. 2027 earnings expected to show improvement as company approaches potential approvals. Revenue growth expectations: 61.8% annualized growth expected. Analyst sentiment: Bullish on late-stage programs and regulatory pathway. Positive view on gene therapy market opportunity. Concerned about dilution and going concern issues.
